citation_contexts: Surface functionalization with Ln complexes offers an interesting alternative by maintaining crystal structure integrity thanks to robust conjugation chemistries [42].

Conversely, Cu-free click chemistries such as strain-promoted [3+2] azide–alkyne cycloaddition (SPAAC) and inverse-electron-demand Diels–Alder (IEDDA) cycloaddition allow for milder reaction conditions, but require the use of bulkier, synthetically more-demand...[truncated]
Click chemistry can occur in buffer solu-tion under mild reaction conditions, reducing the requirement for equipment in large-scale production [169,170].
Successful synthesis of PNA–PLL-g-Dex was achieved through strain-promoted azide– alkyne cycloaddition for its high orthogonality, high yield, limited side reactions, and simple operation 27 – 31 .
